requiredContext.sql: SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail, o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus, o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id LIMIT 10
